compactPrompt: When compacting this session, you MUST preserve verbatim: the active target + open milestone checkboxes from dreams.md §1, the load-bearing rules from CLAUDE.md and .claude/rules/ (static-first / no-SSR / never-Vercel, the CF Pages shared-build-settings trap, native view transitions / no ClientRouter, the glow pre-paint root-CSS-var script, the _headers cache-rule combine conflict), the exact file paths modified this session, and any precise error signatures currently under evaluation. Discard greeting filler, historical conversational prose, and superseded styling discussion.

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE '(pnpm( +run)? +(build|preview)|astro +(build|check))' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"CRITICAL: if structure/routes/architecture shifted, update CLAUDE.md, the relevant .claude/rules/ file, and README.md in the same change."}}' || true
